home.tagline: Your Partner in Professional Eye Care Excellence
home.subtitle: Experience & Training Center
home.hero: Professional Eye Care & Contact Lens Consultation Services
home.heroDesc: Personalized optometry services by appointment only. Expert eye screening and contact lens fitting with dedicated professional care.
home.about: About SEED X TOPCON Healthcare VISION HUB
home.aboutDesc1: Our VISION HUB is dedicated to enhancing public eye health awareness and providing comprehensive eye care services. We specialize in advanced eye screening, contact lens fitting, and personalized optometry care.
home.aboutDesc2: With cutting-edge technology and professional expertise, we serve patients with various eye conditions, including specialized care for keratoconus patients who require advanced contact lens solutions.
home.missionDesc: To provide exceptional eye care services and raise awareness about eye health conditions, ensuring every patient receives personalized attention and the best possible vision care solutions.
home.objectiveDesc: To enhance vision care and professional competency through targeted initiatives across Screening, Academic, and Training pillars.
home.screeningDesc: Increase eye health awareness through preliminary vision assessments
home.academicDesc: Establish a dynamic learning environment for student engagement and clinical confidence
home.academicPoint1: Provide access to full-scale contact lens product range
home.academicPoint3: Enhance familiarity with advanced diagnostic equipment
home.trainingDesc: Develop a comprehensive training center to uplift eyecare service standards
home.trainingPoint1: Structured modules for new and existing staff
home.trainingPoint4: Support long-term clinical and retail capabilities
home.keratoconusDesc: Keratoconus is a progressive eye condition where the cornea thins and bulges into a cone shape. Our VISION HUB offers specialized contact lens solutions including:
home.topconMyahDesc: Experience cutting-edge TOPCON MYAH technology for comprehensive eye health assessment
home.topconDesc: The TOPCON MYAH is a revolutionary device that provides comprehensive myopia management and eye health monitoring, helping to detect and manage vision changes with precision.
home.topconFeature1Desc: Monitor changes in myopia with exceptional accuracy to prevent further progression
home.topconFeature2Desc: Advanced topography mapping for detailed corneal shape and health assessment
home.topconFeature3Desc: Identify potential eye conditions before they become serious problems
home.topconFeature4Desc: Quick, painless examination suitable for all ages, including children
home.topconFeature5Desc: Detailed reports help our optometrists provide personalized treatment plans
home.eyeScreeningDesc: Comprehensive eye examinations for various conditions - Click to book
home.contactConsultationDesc: Professional fitting and consultation services - Click to book
home.contactExperienceDesc: Try and experience various types of contact lenses

pdpa.title: Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) 2024 Consent
pdpa.description: In compliance with the Personal Data Protection Act 2024, we require your explicit consent for the collection, processing, and use of your personal data.
pdpa.collectionDesc: I consent to SEED X TOPCON Healthcare VISION HUB collecting my personal data (name, email, phone, health information) for appointment booking and healthcare services.
pdpa.processingDesc: I consent to the processing of my personal data for appointment scheduling, service delivery, and healthcare record management.
pdpa.storageDesc: I consent to the secure storage of my personal data for healthcare records and future appointments (minimum 7 years as per healthcare regulations).
pdpa.sharingDesc: I consent to sharing my data with authorized healthcare partners (referrals, specialist consultations) when necessary for my care.
pdpa.marketingDesc: I consent to receiving promotional materials, health tips, and service updates via email/SMS.
pdpa.retentionDesc: I consent to retaining my data beyond the minimum required period for improved personalized care and service history.
pdpa.right1: Right to access your personal data
pdpa.right3: Right to withdraw consent at any time
pdpa.right5: Right to request data deletion (subject to healthcare regulations)
